global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with bold text elements promoting savings.
global.main_message: Promoting last-minute travel savings with a clear call to action.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Background shapes
elements.description: The background features abstract geometric shapes in varying shades of blue, creating a dynamic visual effect.

elements.label: WayPoint logo
elements.description: A bold, uppercase text logo reading 'WayPoint' in a prominent position at the top, styled in a contrasting color.

elements.label: Last-minute savings
elements.description: A large, eye-catching headline that reads 'Last-minute savings' in a clear, modern font, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Special fares today
elements.description: A smaller text line below the headline that states 'Special fares today', providing additional context.

elements.label: Decorative icon
elements.description: A small decorative icon positioned at the top, possibly representing a theme related to travel or savings.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: An unclear element that may contain additional visual details, positioned centrally but not clearly defined.

elements.label: Shop now button
elements.description: A prominent call-to-action button at the bottom that reads 'Shop now', designed to attract user interaction.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A clear price tag displaying '€29.99', positioned just above the call-to-action button, emphasizing affordability.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, bright and modern, WayPoint logo, last-minute savings.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline and body text in the center, with the price and CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: WayPoint, Last-minute savings, Special fares today, €29.99, Shop now
